evalId.description: UUID of the eval item this run is executing. Also the parentId of this eval-run item — eval runs accumulate as children of their eval.

pipelineRunId.description: UUID of the pipeline-run item created for this eval execution. The full pipeline run record (phase statuses, itemsProduced, gate results) is available there.

status.description: Overall eval result. running=pipeline or assertion evaluation in progress; passed=all assertions passed; failed=one or more assertions failed (pipeline completed successfully but output did not meet assertions); error=pipeline run itself failed before assertions could be evaluated.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the eval run started.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when all assertions finished evaluating.

phases.description: Per-phase assertion results, one entry per phase declared in the eval definition.

phaseId.description: Matches the phaseId in the eval definition.

status.description: pending=pipeline phase not yet complete; running=assertions evaluating; passed=all assertions in this phase passed; failed=one or more assertions failed; skipped=phase was skipped by the pipeline runner so assertions were not evaluated.

assertions.description: Results for each assertion declared in the eval definition for this phase.

id.description: Matches the assertion id in the eval definition.

status.description: passed=assertion condition met; failed=assertion condition not met; skipped=phase was skipped or assertion could not run; error=assertion evaluation threw an exception.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation of why the assertion failed or errored. Null if passed. For count assertions: actual vs expected count. For payload/meta: which items failed the expression and what their values were. For no-regression: which golden concepts were missing.

verdict.description: llm-judge assertions only: the verdict returned by the judge agent via kanecta_judge_verdict. Null for other assertion types.

reasoning.description: llm-judge assertions only: the judge agent's reasoning behind the verdict. Stored verbatim. Null for other assertion types.

error.description: Top-level error message if the eval run errored before completing assertion evaluation. Null otherwise.
